tools.name: get_stadium_telemetry
tools.title: Get stadium telemetry
tools.description: Return the latest cached telemetry (crowd density, gate wait times, transit ETA, ADA restroom availability, sustainability score) for a FIFA 2026 host stadium. Falls back to best-effort static values when live telemetry is unavailable.

stadium.description: Stadium identifier, e.g. MetLife, SoFi, Azteca, Lumen.

tools.name: get_wayfinding_route
tools.title: Get in-stadium walking route
tools.description: Compute a step-by-step walking route inside the stadium between two landmarks (gates, sections, amenities). Marks the route as degraded with a best-effort guide when the live routing service is unavailable.

tools.name: get_transit_options
tools.title: Get transit options
tools.description: Return public transit and shuttle options departing near the stadium toward a given destination, including next-departure ETA and accessibility.

stadium.description: Stadium identifier, e.g. MetLife, SoFi, Azteca.

tools.name: get_sustainability_tip
tools.title: Get sustainability tip
tools.description: Return an actionable, stadium-specific sustainability tip (recycling, hydration stations, low-impact transit).

stadium.description: Stadium identifier, e.g. MetLife, SoFi, Azteca.

tools.name: list_my_threads
tools.title: List my StadSpear threads
tools.description: List the signed-in user's StadSpear concierge conversations, newest first. Returns thread id, title, stadium, match, role, language, favorite flag, and last viewed timestamp.

limit.description: Max threads to return (1-100). Defaults to 20 if omitted or out of range.

favoriteOnly.description: If true, only return threads the user has marked as favorite.

tools.name: get_thread_messages
tools.title: Get messages in a thread
tools.description: Return the messages of one of the signed-in user's StadSpear threads, oldest first. RLS enforces that only threads owned by the caller are readable.

threadId.description: UUID of the thread to read.

limit.description: Max messages to return (1-200). Defaults to 50.
